allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('link:', d.get\('link','ERROR'\)\); print\('error:', d.get\('error','none'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); lnk=d.get\('link'\); print\('linked to:', lnk\) if lnk else print\('error:', d.get\('error','unknown'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('link:', json.dumps\(d.get\('link'\), indent=2\)\); print\('rootDir:', d.get\('rootDirectory'\)\)")
